creator: arjun.anantharam@intel.com
text:
Created attachment 251853
Full FreeBSD installation log with Panic

FreeBSD-14.1-RELEASE-arm64-aarch64-memstick.img on ARM Neoverse cores results in kernel panics possibly due to handling NVMe(on which FreeBSD iso resides) device attached to PCie interface:  
nvme1: Lazy allocation of 0x4000 bytes rid 0x10 type 3 at 0x28000000
nvme1: attempting to allocate 2 MSI-X vectors (136 supported)
nvme1: using IRQs 38-39 for MSI-X
